description: 🌽🍓 IT'S BACK! The Oshkosh Farmers Market returns THIS SATURDAY! 🎉 Join us on the 400 & 500 blocks of N. Main St. and the 100 block of Church Ave. this Saturday, May 30 from 8 a.m. – 12:30 p.m. for Opening Day of one of the BEST farmers markets in the country! Explore 165+ vendors featuring fresh seasonal produce, local meats and poultry, artisan breads, handmade crafts, ready-to-eat foods, live music, and so much more. Rain or shine — see you there every Saturday through October 31! 🌿☀️ 📍 Downtown Oshkosh, N. Main St. 🕗 Saturdays | 8 a.m. – 12:30 p.m. 🔗 https://bit.ly/4nYo4mE

layoutDescription: Full-bleed hero photo with directional gradient overlay (not centered vignette); headline anchored bottom-left or bottom-right; strong contrast type; optional sticky mobile call bar.
mood: Warm, appetizing, neighborhood favorite — invite hunger and comfort
antiPatterns: No fake Google star widgets unless review_score provided. No SaaS feature grids. Food sites should feel sensory (texture, warmth, appetite), not corporate.
photoInventory: You will receive 12 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
